nodes.label: AI as writing assistant for drafting
nodes.grounding_span: I'll use an AI assistant to help draft or check my correspondence via DM or email

nodes.label: AI response quality and professionalism
nodes.grounding_span: I worry that if a partner or advertiser checks my message using one of those AI detector websites like Quillbot that they'll feel as though I'm not being professional

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.grounding_span: I'm comfortable using AI-assistance tools for very repetitive and non-creative tasks like tracking a subject

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I don't really trust AI to provide reliable and comprehensive research at this stage in its development

nodes.label: AI as task delegator for complete tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I rarely collaborate... that work is very delegative

nodes.label: AI as job threat
nodes.label_negative: AI enhancing job skills and positioning
nodes.grounding_span: I worry, likewise, that the skillset I've acquired with video editing... is going to become redundant

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: they'll feel as though I'm not being professional

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: it saved so much time versus my typical workflow

nodes.label: Creative control and originality
nodes.grounding_span: For more creative tasks... I prefer to do that myself

nodes.label: Job security and skill relevance
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to be replaceable

nodes.label: Hesitation to experiment with AI due to professional risks
nodes.grounding_span: I often decide not to use AI to draft my messages because of that concern

nodes.label: Optimistic anticipation of AI's video editing capabilities
nodes.grounding_span: I was surprised by how good of a job it did tracking the subject's face and applying effects. That felt satisfying

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: The high degree of certitude that an AI assistant will use to communicate information that is objectively incorrect can make the interaction feel very frustrating

nodes.label: Anxiety about skills becoming redundant due to AI
nodes.grounding_span: I worry, likewise, that the skillset I've acquired... is going to become redundant

nodes.label: Desire for more capable AI tools
nodes.grounding_span: I hope that AI tools are integrated into video editing software to the point where I can give higher level instructions

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting — clear separation of AI-appropriate vs. human-only tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I'll typically only use AI to draft my messages if I'm reasonably confident that the collaborator or advertiser I'm communicating with is using AI to draft their messages

nodes.label: Proactive skill positioning — strategically uses AI to maintain relevance
nodes.grounding_span: I've sought to work freelance... to situate myself so that I'm a person who is known for using these tools effectively
